files.content: --- import type { HTMLAttributes } from "astro/types" import { cn } from "@/lib/utils" const HEADER_HEIGHT = "4rem" const HEADER_INSET_SPACING = "0.5rem" const HEADER_SHEET_WIDTH = "18rem" const HEADER_WIDTH = "var(--container, var(--breakpoint-xl))" type Props = HTMLAttributes<"div"> const { class: className, style, ...props } = Astro.props const resolvedStyle = [ `--header-height: ${HEADER_HEIGHT}`, `--header-inset-spacing: ${HEADER_INSET_SPACING}`, `--header-sheet-width: ${HEADER_SHEET_WIDTH}`, `--header-width: ${HEADER_WIDTH}`, typeof style === "string" ? style : undefined, ] .filter(Boolean) .join("; ") ---

--- import { MenuIcon } from "@lucide/astro" import type { ComponentProps } from "astro/types" import { SheetTrigger } from "@/components/ui/sheet" type Props = ComponentProps const { class: className, ...props } = Astro.props --- Toggle mobile menu

--- import type { ComponentProps } from "astro/types" import { cn } from "@/lib/utils" import { SheetContent, SheetDescription, SheetHeader, SheetTitle, } from "@/components/ui/sheet" type Props = ComponentProps const { class: className, side = "right", ...props } = Astro.props --- Header menu Displays the mobile header navigation.

---
import type { ComponentProps } from "astro/types"

import HeaderSheet from "./header-sheet.astro"

type Props = ComponentProps<typeof HeaderSheet>

const { ...props } = Astro.props
---

<HeaderSheet {...props}>
  <slot />
</HeaderSheet>

export { default as HeaderProvider } from "./header-provider.astro"
export { default as Header } from "./header.astro"
export { default as HeaderGroup } from "./header-group.astro"
export { default as HeaderTrigger } from "./header-trigger.astro"
export { default as HeaderMobile } from "./header-mobile.astro"
export { default as HeaderSheet } from "./header-sheet.astro"
export { default as HeaderInset } from "./header-inset.astro"
export { default as HeaderActions } from "./header-actions.astro"
export { default as HeaderContent } from "./header-content.astro"
